timeout.comment: 5 minutes max for AI-initiated timeout, only for harassment/rule violations

purge.comment: Max 10 messages for spam/inappropriate content cleanup

descriptions._comment: Human-readable descriptions of why commands are in each category
descriptions.open: Default for commands with no userPermissions and not in overrides - AI can use freely
descriptions.userRequestOnly: Commands with financial risk, destructive shared-state changes, or that target other users - requires user intent
descriptions.privileged: Commands with userPermissions set, or in overrides.privileged - requires user request AND permissions
descriptions.freeWillExceptions: Privileged commands AI can use proactively with strict limits
descriptions.restricted: Commands with devOnly flag or in DEV/ADMIN categories - never available to AI
